channel.title: Edgar's Personal Wiki
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Edgar's Personal Wiki

item.title: Edgar's Personal Wiki
item.description: Edgar’s Personal Wiki Public notebook This is the public edge of a private working wiki: source-backed notes about software, systems, books, institutions, and the moments where fiction explains reality better than reality explains itself.

item.title: bell-labs-research-culture
item.description: Bell Labs Research Culture Bell Labs research culture, in Bjarne Stroustrup’s Peterman Pod episode, is a model of practical engineering research built around talent density, autonomy, and concise accountability.

item.title: c-plus-plus
item.description: C++ C++ is a programming language created by Bjarne Stroustrup.

item.title: computer-science-education
item.description: Computer-Science Education Computer-science education, in David J.

item.title: engineering-career-growth
item.description: Engineering Career Growth Engineering career growth, in the currently ingested Peterman Pod sources, is less about doing more of the same work and more about matching behavior to the next level’s expectations.

item.title: programming-language-design
item.description: Programming Language Design Programming language design, in Bjarne Stroustrup’s Peterman Pod episode, is problem-first engineering under constraints rather than an unconstrained search for elegance.

item.title: bjarne-stroustrup
item.description: Bjarne Stroustrup Bjarne Stroustrup is the creator of C++ and a former Bell Labs researcher.

item.title: ryan-peterman
item.description: Ryan Peterman Ryan Peterman is the host of The Peterman Pod and author of The Developing Dev.

item.title: peterman-pod-bjarne-stroustrup-cpp
item.description: Peterman Pod: Bjarne Stroustrup on C++ and Bell Labs This May 18, 2026 episode of The Peterman Pod features Bjarne Stroustrup, creator of C++ and former Bell Labs researcher.

item.title: the-peterman-pod
item.description: The Peterman Pod The Peterman Pod is a podcast hosted by Ryan Peterman.
